goal: Users can follow/unfollow profiles and see a filtered feed of only followed users.
summary: Follow/Unfollow + Following Feed phase complete. Added follow/unfollow buttons to ProfilePage using useFollow/useUnfollow/useIsFollowing, conditionally hidden when viewing own profile. Shows 'Follow'/'Following'/'Unfollow' states with loading spinner. Following tab filter was already wired via useFeedPosts hook with follows table query. Added real-time follower/following counts using useFollowerCount and useFollowingCount hooks that query Supabase count() on the follows table, replacing stale profile columns. Counts invalidate on follow/unfollow success for immediate UI updates. TypeScript compiles with 0 errors.
stepSummaries:
1. Add follow/unfollow buttons to ProfilePage using useFollow, useUnfollow, and useIsFollowing [verified]
  2. Wire the 'Following' tab in CommunityPage to filter feed posts by followed user IDs, using the follows table [verified]
  3. Update follower/following counts display on ProfilePage to reflect real data [verified]
  4. Final type-check verification [verified]
